# Storage Host

**Status**: [Development][DocumentStatus]

This document defines semantic conventions for storage hosts.

## Storage Host Entity

A storage host represents a server or system that is configured to access storage
resources from a storage system.

<!-- semconv entity.storage.host -->

**Status:** ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue)

**type:** `storage.host`

**Description:** A storage host represents a server or system that is configured to access storage resources from a storage system.

**Attributes:**

| Role | Key | Stability | [Requirement Level](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/attribute-requirement-level/) | Value Type | Description | Example Values |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Identity | [`storage.host.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique host identifier within the storage system. | `0`; `1` |
| Description | [`storage.host.fc_port.id`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Highlights the identifier of the Fibre Channel port belonging to the host. | `0`; `1` |
| Description | [`storage.host.fc_port.wwpn`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the worldwide port name (WWPN) of the host's Fibre Channel port. | `10:00:00:00:C9:12:34:56`; `20:00:00:25:B5:AB:CD:EF` |
| Description | [`storage.host.name`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the unique host name within the storage system. | `app-server-01`; `db-host-prod` |
| Description | [`storage.host.status`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates whether the configured host is online or offline. | `online`; `offline` |
| Description | [`storage.host.type`](/docs/registry/attributes/storage.md) | ![Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/-development-blue) | `Recommended` | string | Indicates the host type. | `ESXi`; `other` |
